problem id: baeb4a11
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01110011 -> 10011000
  00011100 -> 11100000
  00010001 -> 10001000
  00110111 -> 10111000
  00101100 -> 01100000
  10110000 -> 10000001
  00000110 -> 00110000
  01010010 -> 10010000

query: 00011010
predicted answer: 11010000
